title: Monthly Rental and Deposit Assistance Program Update – December 2025
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: January 14, 2026
TO: Honorable Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Monica Kirch, Director
DEPT: Housing and Neighborhood Development

SUBJECT: Monthly Rental and Deposit Assistance Program Update – December 2025

During the March 31, 2022 City Council Special Meeting, staff was asked to provide monthly updates on rental and deposit assistance provided through the Housing and Neighborhood Development (HAND) department. The following information reflects the amount expended and number of unique households assisted with rental, deposit, and/or utility assistance.

December 2025
• $354,481.96 expended
• 141 unique households assisted

Expenditures for December 2025 were 1% more than November 2025 ($353,399.75). From July 1, 2025 to date, $1,572,111.85 has been expended through the rental and deposit assistance program.

Below is a monthly 2-year expenditure history.

fields.tldr: The Housing and Neighborhood Development (HAND) department provided its monthly update on rental and deposit assistance for December 2025. In December 2025, $354,481.96 was expended to assist 141 unique households with rental, deposit, and/or utility assistance. This represents a 1% increase over November 2025 expenditures of $353,399.75. From July 1, 2025 through December 2025, a cumulative total of $1,572,111.85 has been expended through the program.
fields.key_stats: December 2025: $354,481.96 expended; 141 unique households assisted. November 2025: $353,399.75 expended. July 1, 2025 to date cumulative expenditure: $1,572,111.85. December spending was 1% higher than November.
fields.action_items: Staff to continue providing monthly updates on rental and deposit assistance as directed by City Council at the March 31, 2022 Special Meeting.

dates: March 31, 2022 – City Council Special Meeting directing monthly updates
July 1, 2025 – start of current fiscal year expenditure tracking
people: Monica Kirch, Director, Housing and Neighborhood Development
